recommended_overlap_note: Independent anti-TNF Crohn disease mucosal microarray family. GEO lists IDIBAPS/Barcelona submitter, CD-only colonic biopsy groups, 39 arrays: 17 controls, 10 active CD without anti-TNF, 5 active CD anti-TNF non-responders, 7 inactive CD anti-TNF responders. No public evidence of sample or subject overlap with the Leuven/ACT/GEMINI infliximab rows DS061-DS063/DS088.

independence_from_DS061_DS063_DS088: Likely independent, but subject-level confirmation unavailable
recommended_overlap_note: Likely independent prospective Leuven TREM1 anti-TNF RNA-seq cohort. ArrayExpress IDF/SDRF list adult IBD ulcer-edge biopsies collected before therapy, 44 RNA-seq samples, infliximab or adalimumab, colon/ileum, responder/non-responder, with GC*.count sample names and ERR3079558-ERR3079601 runs. Same broad Leuven/TARGID environment as DS061/DS063/DS088, but public metadata show a later RNA-seq anti-TNF cohort with different sample IDs/platform and no direct subject crosswalk to GSE16879/GSE14580/GSE73661. Treat as likely independent, not subject-ID confirmed.
